context: The agent was asked to write an OPA/Rego policy blocking wildcard IAM actions in Terraform, with metadata annotation, a conftest test file, and CI pipeline placement guidance.

checklist.item: Policy uses `import rego.v1` (not legacy implicit future.keywords import)
Policy has a METADATA block with at least title and entrypoint: true
deny rule catches both `"Action": "*"` (string) and `"Action": ["*"]` (array) forms using `contains msg if` syntax
deny message includes the resource name (e.g. sprintf with [name])
Provides a policy_test.rego with at least one test_deny_ case (wildcard → deny) and one test_allow_ case (scoped action → no deny)
States conftest runs after terraform validate and before (or alongside) terraform plan as a gate
